name: Statement Ingestion
description: Owns file parsing and import workflow; creates canonical LEDGER transactions and may use CLASSIFY. Awaiting its own brainstorm.
problem_statement: Manual transaction entry cannot keep three accounts complete, while bank statements arrive as heterogeneous PDF, CSV, and Excel files that require safe parsing, normalization, deduplication, and review.
why_now: Historical and recurring statement imports are needed to populate the ledger at useful scale.

rationale: Imports may request automatic category suggestions, but uncategorized transactions remain valid.
Every accepted statement row must become or match a canonical ledger transaction.
